column1: 引き受けた上は、最後までやり遂げる。
column2: ひきうけたうえは、さいごまでやりとげる。
column3: Now that I've accepted it, I'll see it through to the end.
column4: 上は (now that, since, given that — formal commitment)
column6: formal expression of commitment or consequence: 'now that X is the case, one must follow through'
column7: 上は: acceptance triggers formal commitment to completion
column8: 上は = formal consequential commitment; からには = since/as long as (also commitment); 以上 = since/above (same usage, more common); たら = if/when (neutral)
